channel.title: GRANT'S FORM - Dilutions Of Grant'ur — Tots
channel.description: A stream of self-contained thoughts from GRANT'S FORM - Dilutions Of Grant'ur

item.dc:creator: Joshua Steven Grant (ie: Jost Grant)
item.description:
Hey, hi, howdy everybody! This is example of a tot. A Tot is my site’s answer to a self-hosted microblog kind-of / kinda thing. lol I don’t know if it’s the right answer, but it’s a gradient solution between a full-blown post and the misc thought / quirky posting and/or meme’n I’m apt to “do on the timeline”. This is more intended for / as progress over time that I plan to publically iterate on. #intro
References: test-refs
Mar 2, 2026 · 10:00 AM
test test test
Mar 2, 2026 · 10:00 AM
